title: Hearts For Food
description: Get extra hearts for the food you eat!
body:
## Description:
This plugin allows you to get extra hearts for different types of food you eat! For every 4 unique dishes you eat, you get 1 extra heart.
## Plugin rights:
none.
## Plugin commands:
-  **/food list**
  allows you to see a list of already eaten and uneaten food.
## Help:
- How can I change the plugin's message language?
  To change the plugin's message language: in the plugins/Hearts For Food/languages folder, edit or create a new message settings file (an example will already be in this folder), remembering its name. Then, enter this name in the config file (in the plugins/Hearts For Food folder) in the language parameter (without .txt). And restart the server at the end.
